title: Front Office Manager - Zomato Restaurant Partners - Attractive Package

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Zomato Restaurant Partners - Attractive Package
jsonLd.description:
Zomato Restaurant Partners is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Chennai. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Zomato Restaurant Partners:
Zomato Restaurant Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zomato Restaurant Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
